keywords_glossary.Taunt: Enemies must attack this unit if able.
keywords_glossary.Ward: The next damage this unit would take is prevented.
keywords_glossary.Charge: Can attack the turn it is played.
keywords_glossary.Stealth: Cannot be targeted until it attacks.
keywords_glossary.Flying: Can only be blocked by units with Flying.
keywords_glossary.Overwhelm: Excess combat damage hits the enemy player.
keywords_glossary.Siege: Deals bonus damage when attacking a player.
keywords_glossary.Ranged: Can attack without being blocked in melee.
keywords_glossary.Regenerate: Restores Health at end of turn.
keywords_glossary.Reborn: Returns to play with 1 Health once when destroyed.
keywords_glossary.Deathrattle: Triggers when this unit is destroyed.
keywords_glossary.Armor: Reduces incoming damage by the listed amount.
keywords_glossary.Freeze: A frozen unit cannot attack until end of turn.
keywords_glossary.Charm: Redirects an enemy unit's next attack.
keywords_glossary.Devour: Destroys a target unit on trigger.
keywords_glossary.Rooted: Unit cannot be moved this turn.
